Instance Method# PerformOperation

macOS 11.0+

```
kern_return_t PerformOperation(uint64_t options, uint64_t dmaOffset, uint64_t length, uint64_t dataOffset, IOMemoryDescriptor *data, OSDispatchMethod supermethod);
```
